mapper.select: SELECT matchup_diff_weight "matchupDiffWeight",team_diff_weight "teamDiffWeight", skill1_penalty "skill1Penalty",skill3_penalty "skill3Penalty", crowding_penalty "crowdingPenalty",top_tier_support_penalty "topTierSupportPenalty" FROM balance_weight_setting WHERE setting_id=1
mapper.update: UPDATE balance_weight_setting SET matchup_diff_weight=#{matchupDiffWeight},team_diff_weight=#{teamDiffWeight}, skill1_penalty=#{skill1Penalty},skill3_penalty=#{skill3Penalty}, crowding_penalty=#{crowdingPenalty},top_tier_support_penalty=#{topTierSupportPenalty}, updated_at=CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE setting_id=1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO match_balance_vote(match_id,voter_key,vote_value) VALUES(#{matchId},#{voterKey},#{voteValue}) ON CONFLICT(match_id,voter_key) DO UPDATE SET vote_value=EXCLUDED.vote_value,updated_at=CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FILTER(WHERE vote_value='PERFECT')::int "perfectCount", COUNT(*) FILTER(WHERE vote_value='NORMAL')::int "normalCount", COUNT(*) FILTER(WHERE vote_value='BAD')::int "badCount", MAX(vote_value) FILTER(WHERE voter_key=#{voterKey}) "myVote" FROM match_balance_vote WHERE match_id=#{matchId}

SELECT f.matchup_diff "matchupDiff",f.team_diff "teamDiff",f.skill1_count "skill1Count", f.skill3_count "skill3Count", AVG(CASE v.vote_value WHEN 'PERFECT' THEN 3 WHEN 'NORMAL' THEN 2 ELSE 1 END) "voteScore" FROM match_balance_feature f JOIN match_balance_vote v ON v.match_id=f.match_id GROUP BY f.match_id,f.matchup_diff,f.team_diff,f.skill1_count,f.skill3_count
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO match_balance_feature(match_id,matchup_diff,team_diff,skill1_count,skill2_count,skill3_count,crowding_count,top_tier_support_count,algorithm_score) VALUES(#{matchId},COALESCE(#{matchupDiff},0),COALESCE(#{teamDiff},0),COALESCE(#{skill1Count},0),COALESCE(#{skill2Count},0),COALESCE(#{skill3Count},0),COALESCE(#{crowdingCount},0),COALESCE(#{topTierSupportCount},0),COALESCE(#{algorithmScore},0)) ON CONFLICT(match_id) DO UPDATE SET matchup_diff=EXCLUDED.matchup_diff,team_diff=EXCLUDED.team_diff, skill1_count=EXCLUDED.skill1_count,skill2_count=EXCLUDED.skill2_count,skill3_count=EXCLUDED.skill3_count, crowding_count=EXCLUDED.crowding_count,top_tier_support_count=EXCLUDED.top_tier_support_count, algorithm_score=EXCLUDED.algorithm_score
